name: Chilled Strawberry Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup confectioners' sugar or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the strawberries and wine in the container of an electric blender.
Blend until smooth.
2. Force the mixture through a sieve to strain out the seeds.
Return the puree to the blender.
3. Add the sugar and yogurt, then blend until mixed.
4. Chill briefly before serving in chilled soup bowls.
